utility_details.judge_error: Both wi_skills and wo_skills runs contain a significant logic error: the expected pick plan requires drawing 80 units from LOT-A and 70 from LOT-B (FEFO with no compliance filtering, or with partial allocation). The wi_skills run, despite invoking the fifo-lifo-controller skill, produced an overly restrictive result by excluding LOT-B entirely (due to the internal 30% threshold) and fulfilling the entire order from LOT-C alone — missing the multi-lot split requirement. For J1 and J2, neither agent matches the exact expected behavior (LOT-A first, then LOT-B, split 80+70), but wo_skills at least demonstrates a reasonable multi-lot FEFO split.
